reason: Design doc: tier-1/2/3 test scope, required mem.ts export changes, acceptance criteria.
Source under test (1461 LoC). Needs `export` annotations on listed pure helpers + platform parsers; no logic edits.
Test conventions + anti-patterns (no hardcoded counts, no tautological tests, no TS type checks).
Patterns for tier-3 CLI subprocess tests (cmdList / cmdSearch / etc.).
Mocking patterns for filesystem / env-var / per-platform session roots.
